title: Phase6DispatchContracts
description: Frozen Phase 6 referral package, dispatch plan, proof, settlement, and continuity contract pack.

PharmacyReferralPackage.title: PharmacyReferralPackage
PharmacyReferralPackage.description: Frozen referral package bound to provider choice, consent, and lineage state.

pathwayOrLane.description: Pathway or lane bound into the package.

PharmacyDispatchPlan.title: PharmacyDispatchPlan
PharmacyDispatchPlan.description: Transport-bound dispatch plan resolved from the frozen referral package.

DispatchAdapterBinding.title: DispatchAdapterBinding
DispatchAdapterBinding.description: Versioned adapter binding for the chosen transport path.

requiresManualOperator.description: Whether manual operator evidence is required.

ReferralArtifactManifest.title: ReferralArtifactManifest
ReferralArtifactManifest.description: Manifest proving which artifacts were included, redacted, or omitted for transport.

PharmacyDispatchAttempt.title: PharmacyDispatchAttempt
PharmacyDispatchAttempt.description: Governed dispatch attempt aligned with the canonical Phase 0 effect ledger.

DispatchProofEnvelope.title: DispatchProofEnvelope
DispatchProofEnvelope.description: Single proof envelope separating transport acceptance, provider acceptance, delivery hints, and authoritative proof.

duplicateOfRef.description: Duplicate envelope reference when evidence belongs to an earlier attempt.

ManualDispatchAssistanceRecord.title: ManualDispatchAssistanceRecord
ManualDispatchAssistanceRecord.description: Operator and second-review evidence for manual assisted dispatch.

PharmacyDispatchSettlement.title: PharmacyDispatchSettlement
PharmacyDispatchSettlement.description: Settlement object tying proof envelope, consent checkpoint, and result posture together.

oneOf.description: Recovery route reference for reopen, bounce-back, or urgent-return follow-on.

recoveryRouteRef.description: Recovery route reference for reopen, bounce-back, or urgent-return follow-on.

PharmacyContinuityEvidenceProjection.title: PharmacyContinuityEvidenceProjection
PharmacyContinuityEvidenceProjection.description: Continuity evidence projection used to decide whether audience-safe calmness is allowed.
